supported_devices: fans, CO2 injectors, CO2 generators, air conditioners, dehumidifiers, humidifiers
port_types: 4x NEMA 5-15 outlet (cooling, heating, humidify/dehumidify, CO2 ppm), 15-ft remote probe connector
compatible_co2_equipment: CO2 generators (LP/NG), CO2 tanks with solenoid valves
recommended_use_note: Full grow room environmental control for temperature, humidity, and CO2 ppm from one unit. US voltage (120V/60Hz) only — requires transformer for Germany.
uvp_notes: US retail price from Growers House (shown as sold out). Prices vary widely across retailers ($97–$835 observed). No EUR pricing found. Hydrofarm may no longer stock this model.
notes: Digital environmental controller with integrated CO2 sensing (US 120V/60Hz, NEMA 5-15). Remote probe includes dual-beam CO2 sensor, temp/humidity sensor, and photocell. Three digital screens: temp, humidity, CO2 ppm. Separate day/night setpoints for temp and humidity. CO2 control supports Fuzzy Logic mode (compressed tanks) and Standard mode (LP/NG generators). Optional high-temp emergency CO2 shutdown (shuts CO2 generator if temp rises 10°F above threshold). Internal battery backup preserves settings during power loss. Built-in data logger (min/max temp, humidity, CO2). Wall- or tent-mountable (two mounting kits included). Compatible with optional power expanders APCL4X/APCL8X. Status uncertain — sold out at major retailers as of 2026; Hydrofarm may have discontinued. Amazon.com ASIN: B07MGJB8G8.
